name: SATUS
short_description: SATUS - global fantasy strategy, in which you can lead one of the 4 fractions: magicians, dwarfs, dark side, hell virus. Every fraction is unique. Capture all the enemies, arrange the end of the world, build a great empire!
detailed_description:
Easy mechanics, hard tactics


Create different units to fight! It's easy to manage big army, but it's hard to win.

Every unit has its own abilities. Magicians have bonus against virus, virus against dwarfs, dwarfs against dark side, dark side against magicians. Be careful

Manage your economy!


You should produce money and food. Every turn you capital consumes food. If you have no enough food for capital, you will die. Use money to build producing buildings(fror example crystal farms or beer factories)

Dangers are waiting for you
    Offers
  • 18 types of buildings
  • Armageddon system
  • 14 types of warriors
  • resource management
  • Simple but interesting economics
  • Special mechanics of countries (virus mutations, magicians' cults, dwarf bank)
  • Nuclear bombs (yes, magicians also have a desire to destroy everything)
  • The game is divided into 3 stages. The first is strategy. The second is a slasher, where you have to hold out for 2 minutes (if you die, you start a new game). Third, strategy again, but you have to fight cyborgs 1 on 1. It will be difficult
  • Advisor system (3 advisors are given to choose from. The higher the difficulty level, the more problems it will create for you)
  • Specialization of soldiers and experience - each soldier has combat experience, as well as the specialization that you choose for him (defense, attack, march)
  • Much more!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Japanese, Italian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Romanian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Belarusian
